summary: Load Guard Alert System + Admin Panel Visibility Fix
features_tested: Alert persistence to MongoDB on manual mode changes
Alert payload contains all required fields (incident_id, timestamps, modes, queues, signals, links)
Dashboard link points to /admin frontend page
Setting critical then normal creates two distinct alerts
Filter alerts by status and type
Pipeline/create returns 429 when guard is critical
Alert system works without SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL (graceful fallback)
Admin top bar visible on admin home page (JourneyProgressBar hidden for admins)
